instructions.ko:
---

## ⚠️ LANGUAGE REQUIREMENT (MANDATORY)

Generate ALL output file content in **Korean (한국어)**.

This applies to:
- CLAUDE.md
- All files under claudeos-core/standard/
- All files under .claude/rules/
- All files under claudeos-core/skills/
- All files under claudeos-core/guide/
- All files under claudeos-core/plan/
- All files under claudeos-core/database/
- All files under claudeos-core/mcp-guide/

Rules:
- All headings, descriptions, explanations, comments, and documentation text MUST be in Korean.
- Code examples inside ```code blocks``` keep their original syntax (Java/Kotlin/Python/JS class names, method names, annotations, keywords remain in English as they are programming language syntax).
- JSON keys in generated files (e.g., frontmatter `paths:`, `name:`) remain in English.
- Markdown structural elements (```markdown, ---, ✅, ❌) remain as-is.
- Use natural, professional Korean — not machine-translated style.
- Technical terms that are commonly used in English among Korean developers (e.g., Controller, Service, Repository, DTO, API, CRUD) may remain in English or be written as 컨트롤러, 서비스, etc. — use whichever is more natural in context.

---
